title: claytonia howellii
intro: Claytonia howellii, also known as Howell's spring beauty, is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. It is a perennial herb that produces small, delicate white flowers and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been reported to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Claytonia howellii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and promote healthy digestion.
